title: SCBE Coding Approval Metrics v3 Marker DPO HF T4
description: Preference repair after marker-focus SFT regressed from 2/5 to 1/5 raw gate pass. Trains chosen exact marker receipts against observed raw near-miss failures and synthetic marker-corruption negatives.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE approval-gate marker fidelity specialist. Copy required marker strings exactly before giving the compact approval verdict. Do not translate, rename, case-fold, pluralize, hyphenate, underscore, or approximate required markers.

evaluation.notes: Raw-output repair test. The promoted production scaffold adapter remains the current deployment path; this DPO run is only promoted if unconstrained raw generation passes the frozen v3 approval contract.

notes: Do not keep scaling marker SFT blindly; the 160-row marker-copy SFT run regressed to 1/5.
Preference rows are built from observed wrong raw responses and deterministic corruption negatives.
This starts from the pushed scaffold adapter because failed raw adapters were not promoted to a Hugging Face adapter repo.
